question: What's the maximum LTV you offer?
answer: Up to 75% LTV — among the highest in institutional crypto lending. Most competitors cap at 50-60% (Ledn 50%, Strike 50%, Arch 60%); we match the best in the market (Figure, Bitget) at 75%. With 1 BTC at $70,000, that's up to $52,500 of credit (vs $42,000 at 60% LTV). Margin call triggers at 85% LTV, liquidation at 90% LTV — still an institutional-grade safety buffer.

question: How much can I borrow against 1 BTC?
answer: At our max 75% LTV with BTC at $70,000: 1 BTC = up to $52,500 of credit. At a more conservative 50% LTV (more margin buffer): $35,000. Total cost over 1 year at 4.25% APR = $2,231 on the full $52,500 borrowed. Over 5 years at 3.25% APR the cost is ~$8,531 total. The Loan Calculator shows live numbers against the current BTC price.

question: How much can I borrow against 1 ETH?
answer: At max 75% LTV with ETH at $2,250: 1 ETH = $1,687 of credit. With 10 ETH (our minimum pledge) at $2,250 = $22,500 collateral value → up to $16,875 of credit. The Loan Calculator shows live numbers against the current ETH price. Min pledge is 10 ETH.

question: What's the minimum pledge amount?
answer: Minimum pledge is 0.5 BTC or 10 ETH. Below that the underwriting overhead isn't economic. At 0.5 BTC (~$35,000) and 75% LTV you can borrow up to ~$26,250. At 10 ETH (~$22,500) and 75% LTV you can borrow up to ~$16,875.

question: What's the minimum loan amount?
answer: Our tiered pricing starts at the Starter tier (4.9% APR) for loans under $1M. For institutional rates (3.9% APR) you need a $5M+ loan size. If your crypto portfolio is below the $100,000 institutional minimum but at least $3,000, you may qualify for Starter Access — apply via your dashboard's Special Consideration Request.

question: What interest rates do you charge?
answer: Tiered rates based on loan size: Starter tier (under $1M) 4.9% APR. Core tier 4.5%. Pro tier 4.2%. Institutional ($1M+, 5-year) 3.25-3.9%. Base rates by term: 1-year 4.25%, 2-year 3.95%, 3-year 3.50%, 5-year 3.25% APR. Murabaha structure — cost is pre-calculated at signing and fixed for the full term. No prepayment penalty, interest pro-rated if you repay early.

question: Are there any origination fees?
answer: Lending arrangement fee 0.5% - 1.0% (waived for loans >$1M). No prepayment penalty. Interest is calculated pro-rata for the actual loan duration if you repay early. Your bank may charge a SWIFT fee when receiving the funds — we pass network/wire fees through at cost with no markup.

question: Which currencies can I borrow in?
answer: USD, AED, or EUR — wired via SWIFT to your registered IBAN. AED at the fixed 3.67 USD peg (UAE central bank rate since 1997). EUR at our admin-published daily spot rate. Conversion rates are shown live in the Loan Calculator before you sign. For GCC currencies (SAR, KWD, BHD, QAR, OMR) we can settle via same-day OTC conversion at loan closing — ask your relationship manager.

question: How fast do I get the loan funds?
answer: After collateral is confirmed (3 network confirmations) funds are disbursed within 24-48 hours via wire transfer. Total end-to-end from loan application to funds landing: typically 48 hours. For loans over $5M add 2-3 business days for credit-committee review.

question: What's the margin call threshold?
answer: At 85% LTV we send a margin call — email + in-app notification + SMS. You have 24 hours to (1) top up collateral, (2) partially repay, or (3) accept a partial liquidation. We monitor collateral health 24/7. If no action and LTV hits 90%, liquidation executes via our institutional OTC desk (no retail-exchange dumping) to minimise slippage for you.

question: How do I repay my loan?
answer: Go to the Lending page in the CRM, click your active loan, then click 'Repay'. Three options: (1) pay the monthly installment as scheduled, (2) partial early repayment, (3) full principal + accrued cost (Murabaha). Wire USD/AED/EUR from your registered bank account to the IBAN shown. When we confirm receipt (same-day on UAE banks, T+1 international), we release the corresponding portion of your collateral back to your custody vault. Full repayment releases all collateral within 24 hours. No prepayment penalty — interest is calculated pro-rata for actual duration.

question: Can I repay early — is there a prepayment penalty?
answer: No prepayment penalty. You can repay all or part of the principal at any time. The Murabaha cost accrued up to the repayment date is still due (no refund on cost already booked) but no penalty on top. Many clients open a 5-year loan and close it in 12-18 months when their thesis plays out — the early-close saves them the remaining 3-4 years of cost.

question: What happens if BTC price drops?
answer: We monitor collateral health 24/7. A margin call is triggered at 85% of your current LTV — you get email + in-app + SMS notifications. You have 24 hours to add collateral or reduce your loan balance before liquidation executes. If no action by then and LTV reaches 90%, liquidation is executed via our institutional OTC desk — no retail-exchange dumping to minimise slippage for you. The 75% starting LTV + 85%/90% thresholds mean your collateral has to fall roughly 17-21% before margin call, giving you meaningful buffer against volatility.

question: What's the loan term range?
answer: We offer 1, 2, 3, and 5-year terms. Rates decrease with longer terms: 1-year 4.25% APR, 2-year 3.95%, 3-year 3.50%, 5-year 3.25%. Most clients pick 3 or 5-year. Custom terms (6 months, 7 years) available on request for loans above $1M.

question: Can I use multiple loans at once?
answer: Yes — no cap on concurrent loans. Each loan is independently collateralised, independently priced at signing, and independently monitored. The Lending page shows all active loans in a single table with aggregate totals. For clients with 5+ active loans we can set up consolidated monthly statements — ask support.

question: What's the liquidation threshold?
answer: 90% LTV. If your collateral value drops enough to push LTV to 90% and you haven't responded to the 85% margin call, liquidation executes to bring LTV back to 60%. Liquidations go through our OTC desk, not retail exchanges — you get institutional execution pricing (typically tight to mid-market) rather than panic-dump retail slippage.

question: Can I extend or roll over a loan?
answer: Yes. Near maturity, go to Lending → your active loan → 'Request Extension'. Extend in 1/2/3/5-year increments at the current rate for the new period. No extension fee — just pay the new-term Murabaha cost from signing. Must be requested before maturity — not automatic.

question: Is lending Sharia-compliant?
answer: Yes. All lending products are Murabaha structures — clearly disclosed cost with fixed-at-signing pricing, not interest (riba). Certified by our Sharia Supervisory Board chaired by Sheikh Dr. Tariq Al-Mahrouqi, a member of the AAOIFI (Accounting and Auditing Organization for Islamic Financial Institutions) Sharia Board. Full Sharia reports are available on our website.

question: Can I use a mix of BTC and ETH as collateral?
answer: Not in a single loan — each loan is collateralised by a single asset (all-BTC or all-ETH). If you want to pledge both, open two separate loans. They'll show as separate positions on your Lending page with independent LTV tracking. Multi-asset collateral is on our 2026 roadmap.

question: What if I want to borrow above $5M?
answer: Loans above USD 5M go through a credit-committee review (typically 2-3 business days). Required additional docs: recent financial statements, purpose-of-funds declaration, signed director's resolution (corporate). Above $20M we may syndicate with partner institutions. Above $5M qualifies for Institutional tier pricing at 3.9% APR. Contact your relationship manager directly — not via the standard dashboard form.
